title: App Settings - General - Privacy Policy
scenario: Privacy Policy link in App Settings > General navigates to Poly Privacy Policy page with close button in upper right corner
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap the Account icon or menu to access App Settings.
Check for a close button in the upper right corner.
Check that there is no back button in the upper left corner.
expected: The Poly Privacy Policy page is displayed. A close button is present in the upper right corner. No back button appears in the upper left corner.
